description: Git/GitHub hygiene. Owns gitignore audit, mandatory secret scan (gitleaks), GitHub Actions CI/CD scaffolding via OIDC, public-readiness checklist, repo metadata, .github/copilot-instructions.md, customer-handoff branches and release notes, and the final commit + push.
shouldTriggerPrompts: set up GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for the POC
is this repo ready to be made public?
make sure no API keys are in git history
create the customer-handoff branch with release notes
set the repo description and topics
wire up workload identity federation for GitHub Actions to Azure
do the final commit and push for this POC
shouldNotTriggerPrompts: design the architecture for the new POC
package the customer handoff doc with executive summary
scope a new POC for Allstate
